center.name: 美國中西部
center.summary: 美國中西部是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联6种鸟类，包括针尾鸭、橫斑林鴞、燕尾鳶等6种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The goshawk continues east through much of Canada as a native species, but is rarer in most of the Eastern United States, especially the Midwest, where they are not typically found outside the Great Lakes region, where a good-sized breeding population occurs in the northern parts of Minnesota, Illinois, Michigan, and somewhat into Ohio; a very small population persists in the extreme northeast corner of North Dakota

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The bobolink breeds in the summer in North America across much of southern Canada and the northern United States; from 1966 to 2015 the species experienced a greater than 1.5% annual population decrease throughout most of its breeding range, extending from the Midwestern United States to the Canadian Maritimes.{{cite web |title=Bobolink Dolichonyx oryzivorus BBS Trend Map, 1966 - 2015 |url=https://www.mbr-pwrc.usgs.gov/bbs/tr2015/trend2015_v3.html |website=USGS |publisher=U.S

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Ontario Birds, 11, 18–22. The barred owl has been recorded as far north as central Labrador, though the species is not yet confirmed to breed in the province. The barred owl ranges in every part of the eastern United States continuously from northernmost Maine down throughout New England, the Mid-Atlantic states, much of the Midwest, the Southeast United States and all of Florida. Their range extends without substantial gaps to the limits of western Minnesota, easternmost South Dakota, the southeastern corner of Nebraska, the eastern half roughly of Kansas, most of Oklahoma and east Texas to as far west as Cisco and Burnet.Janssen, R

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Historic ranges in the United States covered the majority of the Southern states and much of the Midwest (in Kentucky, Indiana, Ohio, Illinois, Missouri, Iowa, Kansas, Nebraska, and as far north as Wisconsin and Minnesota). Aside from the US, it resides in many areas throughout Central and South America

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It breeds on the prairie grasslands of the Midwestern United States and winters in Central America, northern Colombia, and northern Venezuela

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: thumb|Non-breeding males wintering in India This dabbling duck breeds in northern areas of the Palearctic as far south as about Poland and Mongolia, and in Canada, Alaska and the Midwestern United States
